question_text: Given below are four statements: Statement 1: Statement 1: All students are inquisitive. Statement 2: Statement 2: Some students are inquisitive. Statement 3: Statement 3: No student is inquisitive. Statement 4: Statement 4: Some students are not inquisitive. From the given four statements, find the two statements that CANNOT BE TRUE

options.C: ANNOT BE TRUE simultaneously, assuming that there is at least one student in the class.
